markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, strategy, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content is working:** The "Expensive Financial Management" cluster grew sessions 63% in two months, validating the current content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [**New FAQ initiative:** Launching an FAQ page to capture Google AI Overview (AIO) traffic, signaled by a competitor's FAQ ranking for a relevant term.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [**New product strategy:** Content for the new travel card will shift from "rewards" to "integrations & controls," based on survey data showing this is the key driver for switching platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [**Process update:** Joel will now approve all content topics before production to ensure alignment and prevent wasted effort.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Overall Performance:** Steady, incremental growth. A recent publishing pause likely explains the current flat trend.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Bet Validation:** The "Expensive Financial Management" content cluster grew sessions 63% in two months, confirming the strategy's effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [**Seasonality:** No consensus on winter seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Conflicting Signals:** Some expect a slowdown (e.g., trades layoffs), while others cite October as a busy month.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Data Point:** Research by Rory (AI tools builder) shows construction permit declines in winter, suggesting a slowdown.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [**Prediction:** Joel expects a slowdown through December, with a pickup in January.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Google AI Overviews (AIO) & FAQ Initiative

  - [**AIO Opportunity:** Hotel Engine was the first citation in an AIO for a group travel search, showing strong visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Competitor Signal:** A competitor's FAQ page ranked second in the same AIO, directly validating the FAQ page concept.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [**FAQ Page Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture AIO traffic by answering common user questions.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
      - [**Principle:** Content must be useful for both bots and human readers to ensure long-term value.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
      - [**Execution:** Kyle will create a requirements brief for Joel's team.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### New Travel Card Content Strategy

  - [**Product Status:** Public waitlist launches tomorrow; full public release is Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Survey data reveals "integrations & controls" are the key switching drivers, not the initial "rewards" focus.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [**Content Impact:** This insight requires a shift in content strategy to target users with high-intent pain points around system integration.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [**CTA:** The team will explore alternatives to the "Join the waitlist" CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)

### Process & Production

  - [**Content Pipeline:** 10 new articles are in the hopper; 2 are ready for Joel's review.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**New Approval Process:** Joel will now approve all content topics (title/outline) before production.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle:** Create the FAQ page requirements brief. **Due:** Monday, Nov 3 (aiming for earlier).](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Share the Airtable list of potential FAQ questions with Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Send all new content topics to Joel for approval before production.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [**Joel:** Review the two ready-to-publish articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**Joel:** Ask Rory for new seasonality insights.](https://fathom.video/share/xrWF42cJXRpcJGNR1drYmZjbpzMBfvdo?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
